pwa.title: Install the guide
pwa.installDesc: Access your welcome guide like a real app, even offline.

hero.title: Welcome to the Domaine
hero.sub: Your guide to making the most of your stay, between sky and sea. Everything you need, one tap away.

stay.label: Your stay
stay.title: Everything you need
stay.hostDesc: Mrs Gallis watches over the estate and is at your disposal for any question during your stay.
stay.equipmentDesc: Designed for your comfort, your stay is fully equipped:
stay.refill: Extra coffee capsules & laundry pods: at the supermarket nearby (5 min walk).

hist.label: The story
hist.title: Built in 1890
hist.p1: In 1890, I had this villa built above the sea, to find some peace far from State affairs. At that time, the Riviera had become the winter refuge of all British aristocracy.
hist.p2: Charmed by the light and the beauty of the place, I entrusted the design of this splendid house to the Monegasque architect Bienvenu Gaubert. He made it a haven of calm and prestige, surrounded by terraced gardens.
hist.p3: Today, La Bastide opens its doors to you. As you cross its threshold, you enter a story that began over a century ago.

map.label: Around you
map.title: To discover nearby
map.intro: Beaches, restaurants, hilltop villages, markets. Tap a point on the map to learn more.

trans.label: Getting around
trans.title: From La Bastide everywhere
trans.uber: Open the app with destination pre-filled

serv.label: On-demand services
serv.title: To simplify your stay
serv.intro: Request any of these services from Mrs Gallis or via WhatsApp. Flat rates, no surprises.
serv.towelsDesc: 2 clean bath towels, delivered to your stay.
serv.linenDesc: 1 clean set of sheets, delivered to your stay.
serv.cleaningDesc: For long stays, mid-stay cleaning is available.
serv.transferDesc: Chauffeur-driven sedan: airport, Monaco, Cannes, stations.
serv.chefDesc: Private dinner on your terrace, Mediterranean cuisine, market produce.
serv.massageDesc: Certified practitioner, to your stay, at the time of your choice.

rules.label: Practical information
rules.title: House rules
rules.parkingDesc: Please park within the yellow lines.
rules.parking2: If the car park is full or you have a long vehicle, a 2nd parking area is available at the last turn before the house.
rules.gateDesc: You received a remote control with your keys, allowing you to enter and exit via the bottom of the estate towards Beaulieu via Chemin des Myrtes.
rules.doorDesc: The door is locked from 9 pm to 7 am. A coloured-cap key was provided to open it outside these hours.
rules.trashGreen: Green bins: household waste (peelings, leftovers, etc.)
rules.trashYellow: Yellow bins: plastic, metal and cardboard packaging.
rules.acDesc: The AC unit provides both heating and cooling. Keep windows closed while in use.
rules.waterDesc: Tap water is safe to drink.
rules.toiletDesc: For the sake of plumbing, please only flush the toilet paper provided.
rules.noiseDesc: Please keep noise levels down, especially after 10 pm.
rules.smokingDesc: The apartment has a smoke detector. Please smoke outside only.
rules.maintenanceDesc: For any technical issue, please contact Mrs Gallis, the housekeeper. We will resolve the problem promptly.

departure.label: Departure day
departure.title: Before you leave
departure.keysDesc: Lock your apartment door and drop the keys and remote control into the white letterbox near the lift, to the left of the main entrance.
departure.cleaningIntro: End-of-stay cleaning is included. We kindly ask you to:
departure.linenProvided: You have 2 bath towels per person and 1 set of sheets per bed.
departure.linenBeach: ⛱️ Please do not take towels to the beach.
departure.linenRenewal: Linen renewal is not included. The concierge can provide replacements for a fee (€10 / 2 towels, €10 / 1 sheet set). Please use the washing machine provided.

thx.title: Have a wonderful stay
thx.body: This residence has crossed the ages while preserving its charm and welcoming spirit. We thank you for choosing La Bastide and wish you a stay as pleasant as it is unforgettable, suspended between sky and sea.

lang.title: Language
lang.sub: Choose your preferred language for the guide.

home.selectIntro: Select your accommodation to access your personalised welcome guide.
